description_long: This is an adult male figure with a large build, dressed in a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and loose-fitting jeans. He wears a protective vest over his shirt, suggesting a security or tactical role, and a brimmed hat that adds a distinctive urban style. His footwear consists of sturdy shoes suitable for walking on city streets. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and he sports glasses, giving him a composed and observant appearance. The clothing appears layered and practical, with the vest providing additional bulk and structure to his torso. The overall look is casual yet functional, blending everyday urban attire with elements of personal protection.
description: A large adult male in casual urban clothing with a protective vest, hat, and glasses, standing in a relaxed pose. The outfit combines everyday wear with tactical elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, protective vest, glasses, and hat clearly, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, vest, and the loose fit of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, shirt, and the relaxed posture, with both arms visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hat, vest, and the drape of the shirt.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with rolled sleeves, loose jeans, protective vest, brimmed hat, and glasses
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
